samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 8bit multiplier based on pipelining processing.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="N">8</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <para>Reset mul_en_out_reg to 0 when rst_n is 0. On the positive edge of the clock, mul_en_out_reg is assigned the value of mul_en_in.</para>
        <para>Reset mul_a_reg and mul_b_reg to 0 when rst_n is 0. On the positive edge of the clock, mul_a_reg is assigned the value of mul_a and mul_b_reg is assigned the value of mul_b.</para>
        <para>Generate partial products based on the bits of mul_b_reg. The i-th partial product is generated based on the i-th bit of mul_b_reg and the entire mul_a_reg. If the i-th bit of mul_b_reg is 1, the i-th partial product is assigned the value of mul_a_reg. If the i-th bit of mul_b_reg is 0, the i-th partial product is assigned 0.</para>
        <para>Calculate the partial sum based on the bits of temp. The j-th partial sum is calculated based on the j-th and (j+1)-th bits of temp. If the j-th bit of temp is 1, the j-th partial sum is assigned the value of sum[j-1] plus the 0-bit partial product. If the j-th bit of temp is 0, the j-th partial sum is assigned the value of sum[j-1].</para>
        <para>Accumulate the partial sums based on the bits of sum. The final product is accumulated based on the bits of sum. If the N-1-th bit of sum is 1, the final product is assigned the value of prod_reg plus the (N-1)-th partial sum. If the N-1-th bit of sum is 0, the final product is assigned the value of prod_reg.</para>
        <para>Assign the output mul_out based on mul_en_out and prod_reg. If mul_en_out is 1, mul_out is assigned the value of prod_reg. Otherwise, mul_out is assigned 0.</para>
    </implementation>
</module>
